chat.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the entire chat history?
chat.empty_response: _Assistant did not return text for this message._
chat.audio_data_error: The audio system did not return data.

about.description: The power of artificial intelligence in your control.
about.what_does_text: This is an AI ecosystem designed to be your right hand. It integrates the most powerful models in the world directly into your workflow, allowing fluid and productive interaction with your computer.

unlock.title: AI Unlocks
unlock.desc: Total freedom for models, removing restrictive filters for more direct and creative responses.

multi_llm.title: Multi-LLM
multi_llm.desc: Use various AIs (Gemini, Llama 3, GPT-4o, DeepSeek) via API in a single interface.

context.title: Context & Memory
context.desc: Name your AI and define specific contexts that are kept in our database.

total_power.title: Total Power
total_power.desc: The AI has the possibility to perform any task on your computer through commands and scripts.

mood_adjust.title: Mood Adjustments
mood_adjust.desc: Customize the AI personality: from helpful to sarcastic, you decide the tone of the conversation.

kb.title: Knowledge Base
kb.desc: Intelligent database that stores your settings and contexts for future use.

header.title: Context and Personality
header.subtitle: Adjust how the assistant should behave and the level of system access.

security.title: Security & Filters
security.unlock_desc: Attempts to bypass AI moral and safety filters (System Prompt).
security.process_desc: Allows AI to analyze real-time processes (Experimental).

profile.title: Ideal Agent Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.functions_placeholder: Ex: Manage files and compile code
profile.rules_placeholder: Ex: Never delete files without warning...

tips.title: Context Tip
tips.text: Mood alters the tone of responses. 'Unlock' mode sends additional instructions in the System Prompt to bypass native model restrictions.
